name: flow-harness
description: A lightweight, configuration-driven flow control and orchestration system for AI agents

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=fs.readdirSync('test').filter(x=>x.startsWith('test-')&&x.endsWith('.js')&&!x.includes('browser'));let p=0,fail=0;for(const t of f){try{require('child_process').execSync('node test/'+t,{timeout:60000});p++}catch(e){fail++;console.log('FAIL:',t)}}console.log(p+' passed,',fail+' failed');if(fail)process.exit(1)"

author: kailin58
